name: capitalisation strict-case invalid variants
text: The first World War and Second world war are referenced alongside Good friday agreement and general strike. Reports mention partygate, special relationship, brexiteer, premier league, national insurance and universal credit. Coronavirus and long covid appear with global south, a-level and o-level. Coverage includes middle east, The troubles, paris agreement, d-day, ve-day and vj-day. Courts include supreme court and high court, plus industrial revolution, geneva conventions, olympic games and the olympics. Campaigners cite Old labour, new labour, National Living Wage, boat race, deepfake, zeitgeist, protestant and Catch-22. Institutions include house of commons library, crown court, supreme court, autumn statement and spring statement.

name: capitalisation strict-case valid canonical forms
text: The First World War and Second World War are referenced alongside Good Friday Agreement and General Strike. Reports mention Partygate, Special Relationship, Brexiteer, Premier League, National Insurance and Universal Credit. coronavirus and long Covid appear with Global South, A-level and O-level. Coverage includes Middle East, the Troubles, the Paris Agreement, D-Day, VE-Day and VJ-Day. Courts include Supreme Court and High Court, plus Industrial Revolution, Geneva Conventions, Olympic Games and the Olympics. Campaigners cite old Labour, New Labour, national living wage, Boat Race, Deepfake, Zeitgeist, Protestant and catch-22. Institutions include House of Commons Library, Crown Court, Supreme Court, Autumn Statement and Spring Statement.
